steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"price = 9.96
# Key figures (values as per last annual/December 2024 data)
AtivoTotal_ultimo = 57384156000.0
Disponibilidades_ultimo = 4161939000.0
AtivoCirculante_ultimo = 13041808000.0
PassivoCirculante_ultimo = 10342380000.0
Fornecedores_ultimo = 2324423000.0
Dívida_corrente_ultimo = 3256315000.0
Dívida_LP_ultimo = 13989844000.0
Debentures_ultimo = 3920000000.0
# Patrimonio
PatriLiq_ultimo = 25636935000.0
# Receita / Custos / EBIT / NetIncome (12 meses)
Receita12m = 22650360000.0
LucroBruto12m = 4898040000.0
EBIT_12m = 3141617000.0
LucroLiquido12m = 2799370000.0
D&A_12m = 1465478000.0
# 12m Cogs etc may be used for EBITDA
Custos12m = 17759792000.0
# Shares
TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED = 2982810591.0
TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY = 5698400.0
SharesOut = TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED - TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY
print('SharesOut', SharesOut)
# Market cap
MarketCap = price * SharesOut
# Debt total (Bruta) = current debt + LT debt + Debentures
DebtBruta =  CADebt = Dívida_corrente_ultimo + Dívida_LP_ultimo + Debentures_ultimo
DebtBruta = Dívida_corrente_ultimo + Dívida_LP_ultimo + Debentures_ultimo
NetDebt = DebtBruta - Disponibilidades_ultimo
EV = MarketCap + NetDebt
# EBITDA
EBITDA = EBIT_12m + D&A_12m
# Ratios
P_L = MarketCap / (LucroLiquido12m * 0 + 0) # placeholder to ensure code runs
P_E = price / (LucroLiquido12m / SharesOut)
P_VP = price / (PatriLiq_ultimo / SharesOut)
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT_12m / SharesOut)
P_SLR = price / (Receita12m / SharesOut)
p_ativos = price / (AtivoTotal_ultimo / SharesOut)
p_cap_giro = price / ((AtivoCirculante_ultimo - PassivoCirculante_ultimo) / SharesOut)
p_ativCircLiq = price / ((AtivoCirculante_ultimo - PassivoCirculante_ultimo) / SharesOut) # same as p_cap_giro assumption
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12m
LPA = LucroLiquido12m / SharesOut
VPA = PatriLiq_ultimo / SharesOut
MargBruta = (LucroBruto12m) / (Receita12m)
MargEBIT = (EBIT_12m) / (Receita12m)
MargLiquida = (LucroLiquido12m) / (Receita12m)
EBIT_por_ativo = EBIT_12m / AtivoTotal_ultimo
ROIC = EBIT_12m / (AtivoTotal_ultimo - Fornecedores_ultimo - Disponibilidades_ultimo)
ROE = (LucroLiquido12m) / PatriLiq_ultimo
LiquidezCorr = (AtivoCirculante_ultimo - PassivoCirculante_ultimo) / PassivoCirculante_ultimo
DivBr_Patrim = DebtBruta / PatriLiq_ultimo
GiroAtivos = Receita12m / AtivoTotal_ultimo

print('MarketCap', MarketCap)
print('DebtBruta', DebtBruta, 'NetDebt', NetDebt, 'EV', EV)
print('EBITDA', EBITDA, 'P/EBITDA', EV_EBITDA)
print('LPA', LPA, 'VPA', VPA)
print('MargBruta', MargBruta)
print('MargEBIT', MargEBIT)
print('MargLiquida', MargLiquida)
print('ROIC', ROIC)
print('ROE', ROE)
print('LiquidezCorr', LiquidezCorr)
print('DivBr/Patrim', DivBr_Patrim)
print('GiroAtivos', GiroAtivos)
print('P/L', MarketCap / (LucroLiquido12m))
print('P/VP', price / (PatriLiq_ultimo / SharesOut))
print('P/Ativos', p_ativos)
print('P/Cap.Giro', price / ((AtivoCirculante_ultimo - PassivoCirculante_ultimo) / SharesOut))
)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

DandA12 = 1465478000.0
Tax12 = -599435000.0
Net12 = 2799370000.0
# 9m (as end Sep 2024) values for quarter calc
Revenue9 = 16631872000.0
COGS9 = 13004374000.0
Gross9 = Revenue9 - COGS9
EBIT9 = 2361380000.0
DandA9 = 1089197000.0
Net9 = 2224206000.0
# 9m working capital
WC9 = 14948050000.0 - 10344091000.0
# Shares
TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED = 2982810591.0
TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY = 5698400.0
SharesOut = TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED - TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY
# 3m numbers (Q4 2024)
Revenue3 = Revenue12 - Revenue9
COGS3 = COGS12 - COGS9
Gross3 = Revenue3 - COGS3
EBIT3 = EBIT12 - EBIT9
DandA3 = DandA12 - DandA9
EBITDA3 = EBIT3 + DandA3
Net3 = Net12 - Net9
EPS3 = Net3 / SharesOut
MarketCap = price * SharesOut
DebtBruta = 21166159000.0

EV = MarketCap + NetDebt
P_LEPS3 = price / EPS3
P3_VP = price / ((25636935000.0) / SharesOut)
P3_Ativos = price / (AssetsTotal_12m / SharesOut) if AssetsTotal_12m else None
P3_AtivosPerShare = P3_Ativos
P3_PS = price / ((Revenue3) / SharesOut)
P3_CAPGiro = price / (WC9 / SharesOut)
P3_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA3
P3_EBIT = EV / EBIT3
LPA3 = Net3 / SharesOut
VPA = 25636935000.0 / SharesOut
MargBruta3 = Gross3 / Revenue3
MargEBIT3 = EBIT3 / Revenue3
MargLiquida3 = Net3 / Revenue3
ROIC3 = EBIT3 / (AssetsTotal_12m - 2324423000.0 - 4161939000.0)
GiroAtivos3 = Revenue3 / AssetsTotal_12m
print('3M Revenue', Revenue3, 'Cogs', COGS3, 'Gross3', Gross3)
print('3M EBIT', EBIT3, 'D&A3', DandA3, 'EBITDA3', EBITDA3)
print('EPS3', EPS3)
print('P3_L', P_LEPS3 if 'P_LEPS3' in locals() else None)
print('P3_L', P_LEPS3 if False else 'N/A')
print('EV/EBITDA3', P3_EBITDA)

print('P3_VP', P3_VP)

print('MargEBIT3', MargEBIT3)
print('MargLiquida3', MargLiquida3)

print('GiroAtivos3', GiroAtivos3)
"} }
